data.name: opcuacoord.svc.name_invalid
data.value: Name allows only letters, digits, underscore and hyphen (1-50 chars; used as file name and MQTT topic)

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.name_duplicate
data.value: Name already exists, please choose another

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.endpoint_invalid
data.value: Endpoint URL must start with opc.tcp://

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.interval_invalid
data.value: Polling interval must be at least 200 ms

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.timeout_invalid
data.value: Connect timeout must be at least 1000 ms

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.not_found
data.value: The specified OPC UA server was not found

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.save_success
data.value: Connection settings saved. Engine will apply automatically

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.delete_success
data.value: Server deleted. Engine will stop polling automatically

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.points_saved
data.value: Points saved ({0} in total). Engine will apply automatically

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.device_name_required
data.value: Device name is required

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.device_name_duplicate
data.value: Duplicate device name: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.tag_name_required
data.value: Point name is required (device {0})

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.nodeid_required
data.value: TagName (NodeId) is required: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.nodeid_invalid
data.value: Invalid NodeId format: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.controltype_invalid
data.value: Control type must be blank/AO/DO: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.ratio_zero
data.value: Ratio cannot be 0: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.minmax_invalid
data.value: Min must be less than Max: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.seq_duplicate
data.value: Duplicate point sequence: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.json_write_failed
data.value: Failed to write configuration file: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.folder_not_configured
data.value: OPC UA configuration folder is not set — configure EngineOpcUaConfig:WatchedFolder in appsettings.json

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.test_success
data.value: Read OK — raw value {0}, engineering value {1}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.test_success_nonnumeric
data.value: Read OK — value is {0} (non-numeric type, cannot be polled)

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.test_bad_status
data.value: Server returned non-Good status: {0}

data.name: opcuacoord.svc.test_failed
data.value: Read failed: {0}
